description: Discover and call 10,000+ production APIs from one MCP server. Pay-per-call billing for AI agents.
name: com.zylalabs/api-hub

headers.description: Bearer YOUR_ZYLA_API_KEY — optional for discovery tools (search_catalog, get_api_info, browse_catalog, list_categories, register); required for call_api and account tools. Get a key with the register tool or at https://zylalabs.com/agents/connect
headers.name: Authorization

title: Zyla API Hub
